entities.name: CEREALS
entities.description: Grains that are a primary part of human diet and nutrition in South Asia

entities.name: GRAIN LEGUMES
entities.description: Leguminous crops used for nutritional security and soil nitrogen fixation

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: Cereal crop cultivated during the rainy season (kharif) in South Asia

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study on rice-fallows was conducted

entities.name: RICE-FALLOWS
entities.description: Land left uncultivated after rice harvest, identified as target domains for intensification

entities.name: MODIS
entities.description: Moderate-resolution imaging Spectroradiometer used for temporal data collection

entities.name: SPECTRAL MATCHING TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Analytical techniques applied to MODIS data to map fallow lands

entities.name: NDVI
entities.description: Normalized Difference Vegetation Index used at 250m spatial resolution to map rice systems

entities.name: GROUND SURVEY DATA
entities.description: Intensive field data used for mapping and validating rice systems and fallows

entities.name: SUB-NATIONAL STATISTICS
entities.description: Regional statistics used to validate derived physical and irrigated rice areas

entities.name: DRY LAND AREAS
entities.description: Low income rural environments in South Asia dependent on staples

entities.name: RESIDUAL MOISTURE
entities.description: Moisture remaining in rice-fallows that allows for the growth of short duration legumes

entities.name: SOIL NITROGEN
entities.description: Nutrient in the soil that is fixed by the cultivation of grain legumes

entities.name: NUTRITIONAL SECURITY
entities.description: The goal of increasing grain legume productivity for the growing population

entities.name: INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing agricultural productivity, specifically in rice-fallow areas
